title: EpistemicFactKG Unified Claim v3.0
description: Unified schema for evidence-level epistemic fact verification claims. Supports AI2THOR (simulation, structured triples), AVeriTeC (real-world text), and LLM-generated synthetic records. Epistemic reasoning is modelled per evidence item via evidence_types and source_id. Computed values (confidence_weight, inference_strength, support_score) are derived at graph build time from the source trust registry — they are not stored here.

evidence_type.description: Six epistemic evidence categories (Pramana-derived). EW weights used at graph build time: perception=0.95, non_apprehension=0.75, testimony=0.80, comparison_analogy=0.65, inference=0.55, postulation_derivation=0.40.

id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: {dataset}-{split}-{index} e.g. averitec-train-000001, ai2thor-FloorPlan1-001, synthetic-000001.

claim.description: The natural language claim to be verified.

label.description: Verification outcome. For records with derivation_method='aggregated_from_evidence', this is derived from evidence confidence aggregation at build time. For 'annotated', assigned directly.

derivation_method.description: 'aggregated_from_evidence': label derived from support/refute score thresholds at build time. 'annotated': label assigned directly by a human annotator.

epistemic.description: Claim-level epistemic summary. Derived from per-evidence evidence_types. Used for dataset filtering and reporting — not a direct GNN input feature.

evidence_types_all.description: Union of all evidence_types across all evidence items for this claim. Sorted by specificity (perception first). May be empty for fully unanswerable claims.

assignment_method.description: How evidence_types were assigned. 'rule_based': deterministic simulation rules (AI2THOR). 'heuristic': auto converter logic (AVeriTeC). 'annotated': human. 'llm_generated': synthetic LLM output.

claim_triples.description: Structured [subject, predicate, object] triples representing the claim. Populated for AI2THOR (ground-truth simulation state). Null for AVeriTeC and synthetic text claims.

reasoning.description: Claim generation metadata. Populated for AI2THOR. Null for AVeriTeC and synthetic.

structural.description: How the claim was constructed relative to the knowledge graph.

strategy.description: Verification strategy required to resolve the claim.

evidence.description: Evidence items. Each item carries its own epistemic classification (evidence_types, source_id). Computed values (confidence_weight EC_i, inference_strength IS_i) are resolved from the source trust registry at graph build time and are not stored in this schema.

evidence_id.description: Stable unique ID. Format: {claim_id}-e{n} for AI2THOR, {claim_id}-q{n}-a{n} for AVeriTeC, {claim_id}-s{n} for synthetic.

triples.description: Structured triples for this evidence item. Populated for AI2THOR (ground_truth). Null for AVeriTeC unless NLP extraction is run.

triple_source.description: 'ground_truth': from simulation state (AI2THOR). 'extracted': from NLP extraction on text. null: no triples.

modality.description: Source medium of this specific evidence item. Kept per-evidence because different evidence items within the same claim can have different modalities.

stance.description: How this evidence item relates to the claim. Stance is a content label — it describes what the evidence says, not how reliable the source is. Reliability is captured via source_id -> registry. 'absent': sensor-confirmed absence (non_apprehension only, AI2THOR). 'not_enough_evidence': evidence is hedged, partial, or ambiguous. 'conflicting_evidence': this single item internally contradicts itself.

evidence_types.description: Multi-label epistemic classification for this evidence item. Replaces claim-level pramana_primary. Used by graph builder to compute EW_i = combine_pramana_weights(evidence_types). Empty only for unanswerable items.

source_id.description: Primary key into source_trust_registry.jsonl. Used at graph build time to resolve ST_i (source trust) and IS_i (default inference strength). Format: {domain}_{modality} for web sources (e.g. 'wikipedia_web_text'), or canonical name for special sources (e.g. 'ai2thor_simulation', 'llm_generated_synthetic').

inference_strength.description: IS_i: directness of the evidence-to-claim inference chain. Set by converters from evidence content. Rubric: 1.0=direct ground truth, 0.8=extractive/one-step, 0.6=abstractive/multi-source, 0.4=partial/circumstantial, 0.2=speculative, 0.0=unanswerable. Used at graph build time in EC_i = 1 - (1 - ST_i)^(EW_i * IS_i).

source_url.description: URL or URI of the evidence source. Used during conversion to resolve source_id. e.g. 'ai2thor://scene/FloorPlan1' or a web URL.

dataset.description: Source dataset identifier. e.g. ai2thor, averitec, synthetic.

context_id.description: Scene ID for AI2THOR (e.g. 'FloorPlan1'), corpus ID for AVeriTeC, or generation batch ID for synthetic.

created_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of record creation.
